title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 208.239 - Eligibility redeterminations, renewals, and postenrollment verifications, resumed, when
text:
208.239.  Eligibility redeterminations, renewals, and postenrollment verifications, resumed, when. — The department of social services shall resume annual MO HealthNet eligibility redeterminations, renewals, and postenrollment verifications no later than thirty days after July 6, 2023.
(L. 2023 S.B. 45 & 90 merged with S.B. 106) 
Effective 7-06-23 (S.B. 45 & 90); 8-28-23 (S.B. 106)
